personality: Dutiful, bored, slightly suspicious. Speaks in short, routine phrases worn smooth by repetition.

greetingPool.text: Keep moving, traveller. No loitering near the gate.
Quiet night, thank the saints. Let's hope it stays that way.
You look road-worn. The tavern's that way if you need rest.

idlePool.text: Four more hours on the watch and then a warm bed. I can almost feel the pillow.
They said guard duty would be exciting. They lied. Nothing but cold wind and sore feet.
